tags.tagFullName: /游戏短内容/套装攻略/套装投稿

equips.equipDesc:
PATK +90, MSPD +5%, CDR +7.5%
Monster kills boost ATK

passiveSkills.name: <color=#FF6150>Requires Smite to purchase. Reduces damage from monsters by 25% and grants 30% more EXP and 20% more Gold from monsters.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Hunter</color>
When a Basic Attack or a skill hits a monster, it takes 90–180 + (<color=#3cb088>0.6% of the target's {hp}</color>) physical damage every 0.5s for 2s (ranged attacks deal 50% of this damage, and heroes only take 25% damage).

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Reward</color>
Increases Physical Attack by 3 and Cooldown Reduction by 0.2% whenever you or a teammate within a range of 700 units kills a monster, for up to 25 stacks.

<color=#4f6f95>
Before 10:00: Deals 25% less damage to minions.</color>

equips.equipDesc:
ASPD +20%, MSPD +50
BAs restore HP

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Swift</color>
Grants 50 Movement Speed.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Lightning Recovery</color>
Basic Attacks restore 20–40/30–60 Health for melee/ranged heroes.

<color=#4f6f95>
Can switch to another pair of upgraded footwear free of charge. Cooldown: 5m.</color>

equips.equipDesc:
PATK +45, ASPD +35%, Crit Rate +20%, MSPD +7.5%
Crits boosts ASPD

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Storm Strike</color>
After landing a critical hit, increases Attack Speed by 20% and Movement Speed by 5% for 3.5s.

equips.equipDesc:
PATK +85, Lifesteal +25%, HP +500
Physical Lifesteal

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Recuperation</color>
Grants 25% Physical skill Lifesteal.

equips.equipDesc:
PATK +80, PDEF +150, CDR +10%
Temp. damage reduction

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Maim</color>
Skills slow the first enemy hero hit by 10%–20% and reduce damage taken from that enemy by 20% for 3s.
({cd}: 8s)

equips.equipDesc:
PATK +35, PDEF +210, HP +900
Offense & defense

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Fearless</color>
When taking damage, increases own damage and Movement Speed by 1% for 3s, stacking up to 10 times <color=#4f6f95>(gains 2 stacks when hit by enemy heroes)</color>.

equips.equipDesc:
HP +900, PDEF +150, MDEF +150
Resurrect on the spot
equips.equipNarrativeDesc: <color=#4f6f95>The graveyard of swords is overgrown with weeds. The dusty bow is entangled by vines. Ancient whispers have echoed across the Misty Marshes for ages—who is it that wishes to resurrect their deceased loved one?</color>

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Revive</color>
Resurrects the wearer 2s after dying and restores 2,000–3,000 Health. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per match.
({cd}: 150s)

skills.skillDesc: 30s Cooldown: Deals true damage to a nearby monster or minion and <color=#2dc6ff>stuns</color> them for 1s.

passiveSkills.name:

passiveSkills.name:

<color=#f264ff>{ap} +30%</color>

equips.equipDesc:
MATK +350, CDR +10%
Great for mages

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Enlightenment</color>
Every 100 Magical Attack increases damage dealt by 0.5% and grants 0.5% damage reduction.

equips.equipDesc:
MATK +150, Magical Lifesteal +12%, MSPD +7.5%
Cleanse and shield at low HP

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Mana Shield</color>
When Health drops below 30%, removes all crowd control effects and grants a shield that negates (500–1,000 + <color=#f264ff>100% {ap}</color> + <color=#3cb088>7.5% extra {hp}</color>) damage and increases Movement Speed by 30% for 4s.
({cd}: 90s).

equips.equipDesc:
MATK +160, Magical Lifesteal +24%, HP +750
Lifesteal increases CDR

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Arcane Conversion</color>
Every 2% Magical Lifesteal grants an extra 1% Cooldown Reduction.

equips.equipDesc:
CDR +15%, MSPD +50
Speeds up skill cooldown

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Swift</color>
Grants 50 Movement Speed.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Tranquility</color>
Reduces the Cooldown of Common Skills by 10%–20%.

<color=#4f6f95>
Can switch to another pair of upgraded footwear free of charge. Cooldown: 5 min.</color>

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Dark Curtain</color>
When taking fatal damage, instead of dying immediately, the hero gains invincibility and a 15% Attack Speed and Movement Speed increase for 1s <color=#4f6f95>(0.75s for ranged heroes)</color>. After equipping this item, its effect duration increases by 0.01s every 5s, up to a maximum of 0.5s.
({cd}: 120s)

runes.runeDesc:
Attack Speed +1%
Max Health +33.7
Physical Defense +2.3

Max Health +45
Health Recovery +5.2
Movement Speed +0.4%

equips.equipDesc:
HP +500, MSPD +5%
DPS aura

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Agility Aura</color>
Grants 12% Attack Speed and 9% Cooldown Reduction, and restores 10 Mana every 5s. Teammates within a range of 800 gain 50% of this effect.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Reward</color>
Increases max Health by 200–400.
Increases main attack stat by 15–30.
<color=#4f6f95>(1 main attack stat = 1 Physical Attack or 2 Magical Attack)</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Guerrilla</color>
Every 3s, grants 5 EXP, and grants 5 Gold to the teammate with the lowest amount of Gold.

<color=#4f6f95>Wielder does not take a share of the earnings from monster and minion kills, but instead gains a separate 25%-50% Gold and EXP (maxes out at the 20:00 mark).

If lane minions die and their Gold is not collected, 50% of the Gold will drop on the ground. Up to 450 Gold can be picked up.</color>

equips.equipDesc:
MSPD +50, MP +400
Magical Pierce

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Swift</color>
Grants 50 Movement Speed.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Magical Mastery</color>
Grants 60–120 Magical Pierce. Restores 10 Mana every 5s.

<color=#4f6f95>
Can switch to another pair of upgraded footwear free of charge. Cooldown: 5 min.</color>

equips.equipDesc:
HP +1,200, MSPD +7.5%
DPS aura

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Active - Starburst</color>
Links with a teammate (by default, the teammate with the lowest Health) within range for 5s, recovering (500–1,060 + <color=#3cb088>20% {hp}</color>) Health and 25% of max Mana to both self and that teammate for the duration. The link will be broken when it exceeds a certain distance. Recovery effects decrease to 20% upon attacking or being attacked. 1 use of Starburst is gained every 50s, and up to 2 can be stored at a time.
({cd}: 5s)
<color=#4f6f95>Roaming equipment active skill cooldown is shared by the team.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Agility Aura</color>
Grants 20% Attack Speed and 15% Cooldown Reduction, and restores 15 Mana every 5s. Teammates within a range of 800 gain 50% of this effect.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Reward</color>
Increases Max Health by 400–800 
Increases Main Attack Stat by 25–50
<color=#4f6f95>(1 main attack stat = 1 Physical Attack or 2 Magical Attack)</color>

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Guerrilla</color>
Every 3s, grants 6 EXP, and grants 6 Gold to the teammate with the lowest amount of Gold.

<color=#4f6f95>Wielder does not take a share of the earnings from monster and minion kills, but instead gains a separate 25%-50% Gold and EXP (maxes out at the 20:00 mark).

If lane minions die and their Gold is not collected, 50% of the Gold will drop on the ground. Up to 600 Gold can be picked up.</color>
<color=#4f6f95>Can quickly switch between Crimson Shadow roaming equipment at no cost ({cd} 300s).</color>

equips.equipDesc:
MATK +180, CDR +7.5%, HP +500
Skill hits slow

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Deep Freeze</color>
When a Basic Attack or skill hits an enemy, it reduces their Movement Speed by 5–10% (for up to 2 stacks) for 1.5s.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Frostbite</color>
Basic Attacks and skills deal an extra (75–150 + <color=#f264ff>15% {ap}</color>) magical damage.
({CD}: 3s)

equips.equipDesc:
MATK +240, CDR +7.5%, MSPD +7.5%
Lowers Health Regen

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Imperil</color>
When a Basic Attack or skill hits an enemy, it reduces their Health recovery and Lifesteal by 35%. Lasts 2.5s.

equips.equipDesc:
PDEF +300, HP +1,200
Slows attackers

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Cold Steel</color>
When taking damage, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by 20%–40% and Movement Speed by 7.5%–15% for 2.5s.
({cd}: 3s per target)

equips.equipDesc:
MDEF +300, HP +1,100
Negates magical damage

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Mist Veil</color>
Grants a shield that negates 400–800 (<color=#3cb088>+7% extra {hp}</color>) magical damage every 15s.

<color=#ffffff>Passive - Succubus</color>
Converts 15% of extra Magical Defense into Physical Defense.

equips.equipDesc:
HP +900, PDEF +150, MDEF +150
Resurrect on the spot
equips.equipNarrativeDesc: <color=#4f6f95>The graveyard of swords is overgrown with weeds. The dusty bow is entangled by vines. Ancient whispers have echoed across the Misty Marshes for ages—who is it that wishes to resurrect their deceased loved one?</color>

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Revive</color>
Resurrects the wearer 2s after dying and restores 2,000–3,000 Health. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per match.
({cd}: 150s)

equips.equipDesc:
CDR +20%, HP +600, PDEF +240

passiveSkills.name:
<color=#ffffff>Passive - Frost Shock</color>
Triggers an ice blast when losing 10% of current Health from a single attack, dealing 130–260 magical damage to enemies within range and reducing their Attack Speed by 15% and Movement Speed by 15%–30% for 2s.
({cd}: 2s)
